message:
fix(fcp-async-core): enable TLS features on asupersync dep and fix reexport tests

Enable tls and tls-native-roots features on the asupersync dependency in
fcp-async-core's Cargo.toml, making the TLS module re-exports (restored
in the previous commit) actually compile. Fix the reexport resolution
test to import the io module and deduplicate the WebSocketConfig type
assertion. Remove duplicate ConnectorRuntime from vectordb connector
(same pattern as the mass connector cleanup).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
